image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about fiber and microbes.
Context visual: Fiber isn’t just a filler in our diets. It feeds the good microbes in our gut.
Escalation visual: But did you know that not all fibers impact our microbes equally?
Evidence visual: Research shows soluble fiber promotes beneficial bacteria, improving gut health.
Payoff visual: This balance supports digestion and can even impact our mood!
Cta visual: Curious about your gut health? Check your fiber intake and follow for more insights!
